basic_details.job_title: DLSA Indore Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority Indore (DLSA Indore)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority Indore (DLSA Indore) Vehicle Driver Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website indore.dcourts.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DLSA Indore Vehicle Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Ability to read and write Hindi, Valid Driving License
qualification.details: 10th Pass Ability to read and write Hindi Valid Driving License

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Interview Practical Driving Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: indore.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download DLSA Indore Vehicle Driver Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Indore Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DLSA Indore Vehicle Driver post is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Vehicle Driver position, candidates must have passed the 10th grade, be able to read and write Hindi, and possess a valid driving license.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the DLSA Indore Vehicle Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Vehicle Driver post is between 18 years and 40 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Vehicle Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Vehicle Driver post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 14000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DLSA Indore Vehicle Driver job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline. They must download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: The selection process will include scrutiny of applications, followed by an interview, a practical driving test, and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Vehicle Driver post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the post of Vehicle Driver in the District Legal Services Authority Indore.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Vehicle Driver is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority Indore, which is indore.dcourts.gov.in.
